title: Galaxy S24 Fe Marble Gray 256Gb Sm S721Bzacpkd
features: Meet the Galaxy S24 FE with Galaxy AI, where every photo sparks endless creativity. Immerse yourself in the full Galaxy AI experience and unlock countless ways to explore your imagination. Snap it, circle it, tap it – discover why it's totally worth it.
Choose your color and make it yours
Discover the Galaxy S24 FE in stylish colors, with a slimmer bezel display. The rounded form ensures a comfortable grip, while the clean, flat design enhances your viewing pleasure.
Colorfully crafted for you
Explore the Galaxy S24 FE that matches your style, featuring a sleek, modern design and vibrant colors.
Built for durability
With Corning® Gorilla® Glass Victus®+ shielding the front and back, the phone is built to last. Plus, it comes with an IP68 rating for dust and water resistance.
Resize it, retouch it with Photo Assist
Use Photo Assist to easily resize, move, and remove unwanted objects in your photos. Transform everyday images into stunning works of art with our AI-powered editing tool.
Imagine it. Sketch it. See it with Sketch to Image
Draw from scratch or on any photo. Use AI to transform that sketch into an image.
Meet the most powerful camera ever in the Galaxy FE series
The ProVisual Engine is a comprehensive suite of AI-powered tools that enhances photos and videos with sharp details and rich textures, expanding the possibilities beyond just snapping a picture.
Stunning low-light portraits with Galaxy's ProVisual Engine
Bring out vivid moments in dark settings. The AI-powered camera ensures your subject stays bright and clear even in low-light.
Get clear shots from afar with Optical Quality Zoom

Capture detailed shots from afar effortlessly. Powered by advanced NPU and GPU, Optical Quality Zoom allows you to capture detailed close-ups without compromising quality. Bring your distant subjects into clear view with ease.
Light up your photos with Super HDR

Capture stunning photos with Super HDR, enhancing colors and scenes. Enjoy enriched color expression and share your best shots directly to your social media, with Super HDR making bright areas even brighter.
Create cinematic moments with Instant Slow-mo

Turn any video into slow-motion with Instant Slow-mo, even those not originally shot that way in your gallery or downloads. Simply touch and hold to apply the effect instantly, then share or save the clip with ease.
Selfies become art with Portrait Studio
Let AI ignite your imagination with Portrait Studio. Self-portraits instantly turn into incredible works of art.
Hyper-realistic gaming experience
Meet the Galaxy S24 FE, now with the enhanced AP performance for smoother multitasking. Enjoy the cutting-edge Samsung Exynos 2400e for an incredibly captivating and realistic gaming experience.
Dive into an immersive viewing experience

Immerse yourself in captivating content with the enhanced Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, now brighter and more colorful than ever. Enjoy a larger screen and slimmer bezels, elevating your viewing experience to the next level.
A battery that works harder so you can play longer
Enjoy extended playtime, powered by a larger 4,700mAh typical battery. Perfectly optimized for video streaming, it's your ultimate companion for uninterrupted entertainment.
Try Galaxy on your phone
Try Galaxy is a web app that lets users enjoy an easy, intuitive, and customizable experience, even without owning a Galaxy phone. Simply scan the QR code to download the app and start exploring.
